visual_language: photorealistic immersive aquatic-urban, vivid blues and greens, coral accents, water ripple textures, dome containers, fish icons, wind turbines
encounter: visitor dives into a living underwater cityscape; collections appear as illuminated dome habitats on the ocean floor; works surface as fish swimming from coral reefs
intent: evoke energy, freshness, and hope through an immersive ecosystem merging water, nature, and urban life
components: aquatic-city surface header with animated wave SVG
fish-avatar work tiles with splash hover overlays
wind turbine silhouettes as section dividers

layout_engine.works: horizontal scroll strip inside each dome
layout_engine.transitions: smooth fade-in on scroll, splash ripple on hover
